name: HealthReport
description: Vault diagnostics — point-in-time health report with graph metrics, check results, and recommendations.

global.schema:
enum HealthStatus {
    PASS
    WARN
    FAIL
}

enum HealthCategory {
    SCHEMA_COMPLIANCE
    ORPHAN_DETECTION
    LINK_HEALTH
    DESCRIPTION_QUALITY
    THREE_SPACE_BOUNDARIES
    PROCESSING_THROUGHPUT
    STALE_NOTES
    MOC_COHERENCE
}

type HealthCheck {
    id: OID!
    category: HealthCategory!
    status: HealthStatus!
    message: String!
    affectedItems: [String!]!
}

type GraphMetrics {
    noteCount: Int!
    mocCount: Int!
    connectionCount: Int!
    density: Float!
    orphanCount: Int!
    danglingLinkCount: Int!
    mocCoverage: Float!
    averageLinksPerNote: Float!
}

type HealthReportState {
    generatedAt: DateTime
    generatedBy: String
    mode: String
    overallStatus: HealthStatus
    checks: [HealthCheck!]!
    graphMetrics: GraphMetrics
    recommendations: [String!]!
}

operations.name: GENERATE_REPORT
operations.schema:
input GraphMetricsInput {
    noteCount: Int!
    mocCount: Int!
    connectionCount: Int!
    density: Float!
    orphanCount: Int!
    danglingLinkCount: Int!
    mocCoverage: Float!
    averageLinksPerNote: Float!
}

input GenerateReportInput {
    generatedAt: DateTime!
    generatedBy: String
    mode: String!
    overallStatus: HealthStatus!
    graphMetrics: GraphMetricsInput!
    recommendations: [String!]!
}

operations.name: ADD_CHECK
operations.schema:
input AddCheckInput {
    id: OID!
    category: HealthCategory!
    status: HealthStatus!
    message: String!
    affectedItems: [String!]!
}
